products.title: MBW Family Hoodie — Black & Chocolate — Bear & Birds Graphic “Mindo • Ecuador” Sweatshirt | Mindo BIrd Watching
products.description:
Bring a piece of Mindo’s cloud forest everywhere you go. This cozy midweight hoodie features a small adventure emblem over the heart and a bold wildlife illustration on the back — a geometric spectacled bear surrounded by colorful Andean birds with “MINDO • ECUADOR” beneath. Soft, warm, and built for everyday wear, it’s the perfect layer for misty mountain mornings, coffee runs, or evenings unwinding after a day on the trail.

 

The fit is relaxed and easy to layer, with a roomy kangaroo pocket and double-lined hood for comfort. Whether you’re exploring new places or simply want a wearable memory of Mindo, this hoodie feels like a travel keepsake you’ll reach for again and again.

products.title: MBW Family Long Sleeve Tee — Cloud Forest Wildlife Graphic (Black & Chocolate Only) | Mindo BIrd Watching
products.description:
A soft, mid-weight long sleeve that brings the wild heart of Mindo, Ecuador into everyday life. The front features a small circular emblem, while the back unfolds a vibrant scene — a spectacled bear surrounded by colorful tropical birds, grounded with the text “MINDO • ECUADOR.”

 

It’s the kind of shirt that feels right on misty morning walks, cool rainforest evenings, or relaxed city days when you want a quiet reminder of the cloud forest. The vintage-weight cotton drapes naturally, the ribbed collar keeps its shape, and the classic fit feels lived-in from the first wear. Whether you’re a traveler, a nature lover, or someone who collects meaningful souvenirs, this long sleeve carries the memory of Mindo’s wildlife everywhere you go.

products.title: MBW Toucan Coffee & Cocoa Tee — Black & Chocolate | Mindo Ecuador Souvenir Shirt | Mindo BIrd Watching
products.description:
Bring a taste of Mindo’s cloud-forest mornings wherever you go. This soft tri-blend tee features a small MBW emblem on the front and a bold geometric toucan design on the back — perched beside a warm cup of coffee, fresh cocoa pod, and chocolate bar. It’s a tribute to everything that makes Mindo unforgettable: birdsong, rainforest aroma, and world-class coffee and cacao.

 

Lightweight and breathable, the fabric drapes comfortably for warm days, long walks, and slow weekends. The relaxed fit and gentle texture make it an easy everyday favorite — subtle from the front, a conversation-starter from behind. Perfect for travelers, nature lovers, and anyone who wants to carry a little tropical energy into daily life.

products.title: MBW Toucan Coffee & Cocoa Tee — Mindo Ecuador Wildlife Travel Souvenir | Mindo BIrd Watching
products.description:
Soft, lightweight, and inspired by the flavors and wildlife of the cloud forest, this tee captures a little piece of Mindo you can wear anywhere. A geometric toucan stands proudly on the back beside a cocoa pod, chocolate bar, and steaming coffee cup — a tribute to two of Mindo’s most iconic aromas. On the front, a small circular emblem rests over the heart, subtle and classic.

The tri-blend fabric drapes naturally and stays breathable on warm days, making it perfect for early-morning birdwatching walks, slow afternoons at a café, or weekend adventures. The colors stay vibrant without being loud, creating a wearable souvenir that feels meaningful rather than touristy. Soft from the first wear, it quickly becomes a favorite — the kind of tee that feels like a memory.

products.title: Mindo Bird Watching T-Shirt — “Tourism Dept.” Ecuador Nature Tee | Mindo BIrd Watching
products.description:
Light, soft, and made for explorers, this tri-blend tee feels like a quiet morning in the cloud forest. A subtle front print reads “TOURISM DEPT.”, giving it the look of an official field-team shirt — the kind worn by researchers, guides, and travelers who know the trails by heart.

 

Turn it around, and the back opens into a vibrant circular emblem celebrating Mindo Bird Watching. Wrapped in lush greenery, toucans and bright passerines form a colorful frame around the words “MINDO BIRD WATCHING” and “MINDO • ECUADOR.” It’s a wearable postcard from a place where mist hangs low, birds call from every direction, and mornings begin with binoculars and fresh coffee.

 

Designed for movement and comfort, the tee drapes naturally, breathes in warm weather, and layers easily on cool trail mornings. Whether you’re exploring Mindo’s forest paths, visiting cafés between birding stops, or simply carrying a bit of Ecuadorian nature into everyday life, this shirt brings the calm and color of the cloud forest with you.

products.title: MBW Family Tee — Wildlife Edition (Black & Chocolate) | Mindo BIrd Watching
products.description:
Step into the forest every time you slip this tee on. The MBW Family Tee — Wildlife Edition pairs soft, tri-blend comfort with a bold back graphic featuring a geometric spectacled bear surrounded by brightly colored birds. “MINDO · ECUADOR” anchors the design, giving the shirt the feel of a wearable travel memory from the cloud forest.

 

Only the Black and Chocolate versions carry this exclusive wildlife artwork, making them stand out with richer color depth and contrast. A small adventure emblem sits over the heart, offering a subtle nod to Mindo’s wild energy and the birds that watch over its trails.

 

Lightweight, breathable, and effortlessly versatile, this tee is perfect for weekend hikes, coffee runs, or any moment your outfit needs quiet confidence and a touch of the extraordinary.

products.title: MBW Family Tee — Mindo Ecuador Wildlife Graphic Shirt | Tri-Blend Adventure Souvenir | Mindo BIrd Watching
products.description:
A soft, lightweight tee inspired by the wildlife and calm mornings of Mindo, Ecuador. This tri-blend shirt feels broken-in from the first wear — breathable for warm afternoons and comfortable enough for long travel days.

 

A small circular emblem sits on the front, but the back is the showstopper: a geometric spectacled bear surrounded by the vibrant birds of the cloud forest, with MINDO · ECUADOR beneath. It’s part art print, part memory — the kind of shirt people ask about because it tells a story.

 

Whether you’re sipping coffee above the canopy, hiking through misty trails, or just daydreaming about your next trip, this tee becomes a wearable reminder of nature, adventure, and the wildlife that makes Mindo unforgettable.
